pages.title: Sentry
pages.content:
# Sentry
> Sentry provides application performance monitoring for developers & software teams to see errors clearer, solve issues faster & continue learning continuously.
Sentry is an application monitoring platform that empowers developers to fix application problems without compromising on velocity, code quality, or developer experience.
## Products
- [Error Monitoring](https://sentry.io/product/error-monitoring/)
- [Logs](https://sentry.io/product/logs/)
- [Session Replay](https://sentry.io/product/session-replay/)
- [Tracing](https://sentry.io/product/tracing/)
- [Seer](https://sentry.io/product/seer/)
- [Uptime Monitoring](https://sentry.io/product/uptime-monitoring/)
- [Profiling](https://sentry.io/product/profiling/)
- [Cron Monitoring](https://sentry.io/product/cron-monitoring/)
## Documentation
- [JavaScript](https://docs.sentry.io/platforms/javascript/)
- [Python](https://docs.sentry.io/platforms/python/)
- [React](https://docs.sentry.io/platforms/javascript/guides/react/)
- [Laravel](https://docs.sentry.io/platforms/php/guides/laravel/)
- [Next.Js](https://docs.sentry.io/platforms/javascript/guides/nextjs/)
- [GitHub + Sentry Integration](https://docs.sentry.io/product/integrations/github/)
- [Slack + Sentry Integration](https://docs.sentry.io/organization/integrations/notification-incidents/slack/)
## Solutions
- [Web / Frontend Development](https://sentry.io/for/full-stack/)
- [Mobile Crash Reporting](https://sentry.io/solutions/mobile-developers/)
- [Game Crash Reporting](https://sentry.io/solutions/game-developers/)
- [AI Observability](https://sentry.io/solutions/ai-observability/)
- [Application Performance Monitoring](https://sentry.io/solutions/application-performance-monitoring/)
- [Real User Monitoring](https://sentry.io/solutions/real-user-monitoring-rum/)
- [Ecommerce](https://sentry.io/solutions/ecommerce/)
- [Enterprise](https://sentry.io/for/enterprise/)
- [Startups](https://sentry.io/for/startups/)

## Pricing
- [Pricing](https://sentry.io/pricing)

## Signup
- [Signup](https://sentry.io/signup/)

## Schedule Demo
- [Demo](https://sentry.io/demo/)

pages.title: .well-known/agent-card.json
pages.content:
Register for Sentry 201: Making Sentry More Useful.  [RSVP](https://sentry.io/resources/201-series/?utm_source=website)

### Sign in to continue

- [Sign In](https://sentry.dev/#login)
- [Single Sign-On](https://sentry.dev/#sso)

 

Account\*

Password\*

Continue [Lost your password?](https://sentry.dev/account/recover/)

[Sign in with Google](https://sentry.dev/identity/login/google/?referrer=login&href=http%3A%2F%2Fsentry.io%2Fauth%2Flogin%2F)

[Sign in with GitHub](https://sentry.dev/identity/login/github/?referrer=login&href=http%3A%2F%2Fsentry.io%2Fauth%2Flogin%2F)

[Sign in with Azure DevOps](https://sentry.dev/identity/login/vsts/?referrer=login&href=http%3A%2F%2Fsentry.io%2Fauth%2Flogin%2F)

 

Continue [Privacy Policy](https://sentry.io/privacy/)

 

Organization ID 

Your ID is the slug either before or after the hostname. For example, `**acme**` is the slug in either `sentry.io/**acme**/` or `**acme**.sentry.io/`.

Continue

pages.title: Welcome To Sentry Docs
pages.content:
[Skip to content](https://docs.sentry.dev/#main)

[Docs](https://docs.sentry.dev/ 'Sentry error monitoring')

- [API](https://docs.sentry.dev/api/)
- Manage
 

Ask AI 

⌘K

orAsk AI

[Go to Sentry](https://sentry.io/) 

# Welcome To Sentry Docs

Sentry provides end-to-end distributed tracing, enabling developers to identify and debug performance issues and errors across their systems and services.

⌘K

orAsk AI

[Next.js](https://docs.sentry.dev/platforms/javascript/guides/nextjs/) [Node.js](https://docs.sentry.dev/platforms/javascript/guides/node/) [React](https://docs.sentry.dev/platforms/javascript/guides/react/) [React Native](https://docs.sentry.dev/platforms/react-native/) [Python](https://docs.sentry.dev/platforms/python/) [Laravel](https://docs.sentry.dev/platforms/php/guides/laravel/) [Apple](https://docs.sentry.dev/platforms/apple/) [Android](https://docs.sentry.dev/platforms/android/) [Dart](https://docs.sentry.dev/platforms/dart/) [JavaScript](https://docs.sentry.dev/platforms/javascript/) [Unity](https://docs.sentry.dev/platforms/unity/) [Unreal](https://docs.sentry.dev/platforms/unreal/)

[GO TO ALL SDKS](https://docs.sentry.dev/#all-sdks)

## Sentry Features

### [Debugging in Sentry](https://docs.sentry.dev/product/)

Monitor, identify, and resolve errors and performance issues across your applications using [Error Monitoring](https://docs.sentry.dev/product/error-monitoring/), [Tracing](https://docs.sentry.dev/product/trace-explorer/), [Session Replay](https://docs.sentry.dev/product/session-replay/), [Logs](https://docs.sentry.dev/product/drains/), and [more](https://docs.sentry.dev/product/).

### [Fix Faster with Seer](https://docs.sentry.dev/product/ai-in-sentry/seer/)

Debug applications with [Seer](https://docs.sentry.dev/product/ai-in-sentry/seer/). Get [AI-powered answers](https://docs.sentry.dev/product/ai-in-sentry/seer/#seer-agent) to questions using your application data in Sentry. Have [Autofix](https://docs.sentry.dev/product/ai-in-sentry/seer/autofix/) generate fixes, and [review code changes](https://docs.sentry.dev/product/ai-in-sentry/seer/code-review/) before merging PRs.

### [AI in Sentry](https://docs.sentry.dev/ai/)

Integrate Sentry into your AI coding assistants using Sentry's [Skills](https://docs.sentry.dev/ai/agent-skills/) and [MCP server](https://mcp.sentry.dev) with your agents. Debug agents and MCP servers by [monitoring your AI features](https://docs.sentry.dev/ai/monitoring/).

## Platform-specific docs

If you use it, we probably support it.

[Android](https://docs.sentry.dev/platforms/android/)

Apple

Dart

Elixir

Go

[Godot Engine](https://docs.sentry.dev/platforms/godot/)

Java

JavaScript

Kotlin

Native

.NET

[Nintendo Switch](https://docs.sentry.dev/platforms/nintendo-switch/)

PHP

[PlayStation](https://docs.sentry.dev/platforms/playstation/) [PowerShell](https://docs.sentry.dev/platforms/powershell/)

Python

React Native

Ruby

Rust

[Unity](https://docs.sentry.dev/platforms/unity/) [Unreal Engine](https://docs.sentry.dev/platforms/unreal/) [Xbox](https://docs.sentry.dev/platforms/xbox/)

## Get to know us

[**What is Sentry?**\\ \\ Application monitoring and debugging software considered "not bad" by 4 million developers.](https://docs.sentry.dev/product/) [**Sentry for AI**\\ \\ Connect Sentry to your AI coding assistants with agent skills and MCP.](https://docs.sentry.dev/ai/) [**Guides**\\ \\ You've set up Sentry. Now what? Practical guidance on what to instrument, query, and alert on.](https://docs.sentry.dev/guides/) [**Pricing & Billing**\\ \\ All about our pricing and billing structure.](https://docs.sentry.dev/pricing/) [**Organization Settings**\\ \\ Information for setting up your organization's Sentry account.](https://docs.sentry.dev/organization/) [**Integrations**\\ \\ Connect Sentry to your favorite tools for source control, issue tracking, notifications, and more.](https://docs.sentry.dev/integrations/) [**API**\\ \\ APIs for accessing Sentry programmatically.](https://docs.sentry.dev/api/) [**CLI**\\ \\ How to use 'sentry-cli' on the command line.](https://docs.sentry.dev/cli/) [**Security, Legal & PII**\\ \\ Security, compliance, and data-scrubbing processes.](https://docs.sentry.dev/security-legal-pii/) [**Concepts & Reference**\\ \\ Core concepts that make Sentry, Sentry.](https://docs.sentry.dev/concepts/)

## Talk to us

[**Sentry Discord**\\ \\ Real talk in real time. Get in it.](https://discord.com/invite/sentry) [**Support**\\ \\ See how we can help.](https://www.sentry.help/en/)

[Security, Legal & PII](https://docs.sentry.dev/security-legal-pii/) [Contribute](https://docs.sentry.dev/contributing/) [Support](https://www.sentry.help/en/) [Changelog](https://sentry.io/changelog/)

[Sandbox](https://sandbox.sentry.io/) [Self-hosting Sentry](https://develop.sentry.dev/self-hosted/) [Developer docs](https://develop.sentry.dev/) [Sentry Discord](https://discord.com/invite/sentry)

© 2026 • Sentry is a registered trademark of Functional Software, Inc.

## Sentry Features

### [Debugging in Sentry](https://sentry.dev/product/)

Monitor, identify, and resolve errors and performance issues across your applications using [Error Monitoring](https://sentry.dev/product/error-monitoring/), [Tracing](https://sentry.dev/product/trace-explorer/), [Session Replay](https://sentry.dev/product/session-replay/), [Logs](https://sentry.dev/product/drains/), and [more](https://sentry.dev/product/).

### [Fix Faster with Seer](https://sentry.dev/product/ai-in-sentry/seer/)

Debug applications with [Seer](https://sentry.dev/product/ai-in-sentry/seer/). Get [AI-powered answers](https://sentry.dev/product/ai-in-sentry/seer/#seer-agent) to questions using your application data in Sentry. Have [Autofix](https://sentry.dev/product/ai-in-sentry/seer/autofix/) generate fixes, and [review code changes](https://sentry.dev/product/ai-in-sentry/seer/code-review/) before merging PRs.

### [AI in Sentry](https://sentry.dev/ai/)

Integrate Sentry into your AI coding assistants using Sentry's [Skills](https://sentry.dev/ai/agent-skills/) and [MCP server](https://mcp.sentry.dev) with your agents. Debug agents and MCP servers by [monitoring your AI features](https://sentry.dev/ai/monitoring/).

Practical guidance on what to instrument, query, and alert on.](https://sentry.dev/guides/) [**Pricing & Billing**\\ \\ All about our pricing and billing structure.](https://sentry.dev/pricing/) [**Organization Settings**\\ \\ Information for setting up your organization's Sentry account.](https://sentry.dev/organization/) [**Integrations**\\ \\ Connect Sentry to your favorite tools for source control, issue tracking, notifications, and more.](https://sentry.dev/integrations/) [**API**\\ \\ APIs for accessing Sentry programmatically.](https://sentry.dev/api/) [**CLI**\\ \\ How to use 'sentry-cli' on the command line.](https://sentry.dev/cli/) [**Security, Legal & PII**\\ \\ Security, compliance, and data-scrubbing processes.](https://sentry.dev/security-legal-pii/) [**Concepts & Reference**\\ \\ Core concepts that make Sentry, Sentry.](https://sentry.dev/concepts/)
